summary: Iteration 2 regression complete. Backend 4/4 passing (root, health, config, 404). Frontend 10/10 public/route-guard checks passing with ZERO console errors after the Supabase data-layer wiring. Landing page renders with light theme, gradient hero 'built for every Zensari.', dark navy chat preview card with coral accents, 9-region banner and 'Our experience pillars' section with 4 pillar cards. Sign-up hybrid layout (dark left brand panel + light right form) renders with all 7 form testids present. Sign-in 'Welcome back', /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email all render. Protected routes /app/dashboard and /app/admin correctly redirect unauthenticated users to /sign-in. /unauthorized shows 'Access restricted', /this-does-not-exist shows the 404 page. The safe() wrapper successfully prevents Supabase 401/404s from crashing the app — no errors observed.
action_items: Apply /app/supabase/migrations/001_init_schema.sql in Supabase SQL editor before next iteration so authenticated UI (Chat, ChatHistory, PolicyLibrary, MyTickets, Notifications, HR/Admin pages) can be exercised end-to-end.
Once webhook URL is configured in System Settings, swap mocked client-side chat replies for the real n8n endpoint and run an authenticated chat test.
critical_code_review_comments: Excellent defensive wiring: every Supabase call routed through services/safe.ts so missing tables/RLS errors degrade gracefully instead of white-screening the app — confirmed by 0 console errors on public pages.

All sign-up form fields have data-testid (signup-fullname, signup-empid, signup-email, signup-password, signup-region-trigger, signup-dept-trigger, signup-submit-btn) — ready for authenticated automation.
Backend is intentionally minimal (per user) — only /api/, /api/health, /api/config. No changes recommended.
Theme persistence via useAppTheme + localStorage looks correct; landing/auth pages remain on light theme as expected; AppShell will switch on user preference once authenticated.
test_credentials: Not used. /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present; authenticated flows intentionally out of scope per request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified that wiring the full Supabase data layer + n8n webhook integration did not regress any public flow. To extend in iteration 3: (a) apply 001_init_schema.sql, (b) create one test employee, one HR rep, one admin via Supabase Auth, (c) drive Chat thread create + message send (mock webhook OK), (d) verify ChatHistory rename/archive/delete, MyTickets create→read, Notifications mark-read, Profile edit persist, Settings theme toggle persistence across reload, HR TicketQueue region scoping, Admin PolicyUploadWizard (uses Supabase storage), RegionPortalManager CRUD, UserManagement role change, AuditLogs read, SystemSettings webhook URL save. Existing pytest patterns in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py can be extended once user adds /api/chat, /api/policies, /api/escalate routers.
rca of the issue: No issues identified in this round.
